column5: Weak to moderately weak, brownish pink spotted black and white, highly to moderately decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE

Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced and occasionally closely spaced, very narrow, rough planar, limonite, manganese stained and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10-20, 75-85 and occasionally vertical joints
